rationale: Trump's active pursuit of an Iran deal and the US military strike killing the Tren de Aragua gang leader are the most US-relevant items this cycle — both involve direct US government action with domestic political and security implications.

top_events.title: Trump seeks 'off-ramp' in Iran deal; Iran confirms Hormuz tied to deal
top_events.summary: Active US-Iran diplomacy could end the Hormuz standoff, lowering oil prices and reducing risk of US military escalation in the Gulf. No signed deal yet — continuation with added momentum.

top_events.title: Trump claims US strike killed Tren de Aragua gang leader
top_events.summary: US military/intelligence strike reportedly killed the leader of the Venezuelan gang with Venezuelan government cooperation — direct US security action with domestic political resonance.

top_events.title: Canadian mother sues OpenAI over ChatGPT-linked suicide
top_events.summary: Growing AI liability litigation in North America adds pressure on US-based AI firms and may accelerate regulatory debate affecting US tech sector and consumers.
